name: Gaspacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the herbs and mash thoroughly with the garlic, pepper, and tomatoes. Slowly add the olive oil and lemon juice.
2. Add about three glasses of cold water (or as much as desired) to the mixture. Stir in the sliced onion and diced cucumber, then season with salt and pepper.
3. Sprinkle bread crumbs over the chilled soup and refrigerate for at least four hours before serving.
